final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original photorealistic editorial photo for a Weibo news/trending-topic banner image, strictly 16:9 horizontal format.

Style/medium: needs a photojournalistic documentary aesthetic, like a high-end candid shot taken on a smartphone at the scene — exact execution is yours
Composition: must be wide horizontal banner with generous negative space for text overlay; city skyline as primary frame
Subject: must include a city dusk skyline with neon lights gradually illuminating, hurrying pedestrians in the foreground, and distant skyscrapers reflecting the last light of sunset
Scene/backdrop: must include an urban street-level scene at golden hour / dusk transition, with neon signs beginning to glow and warm sunset reflections on glass towers
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic, high-contrast light atmosphere — warm sunset glow colliding with cool neon — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction of warm amber sunset against cool neon blues and purples — exact ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs sharp, crisp detail rendering with strong sense of physical presence — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all three text elements:
  - Main headline (prominent position, bold gothic or modern typeface): "城市里的安静时刻"
  - Subtext: "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙"
  - Watermark (bottom-right corner): "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察"
Constraints: must preserve strict 16:9 horizontal ratio; text must be legible against the image; headline in most visually prominent position
Avoid: staged or overly polished commercial look; avoid cluttered composition that leaves no room for text
